request: Lord, please nurture a spirit of authentic discipleship within us, sustained by Your Word faithfully preached and a community rich in grace. Let the Gospel be our daily bread, distinguishing our lives with holiness and cheerful generosity. Keep our focus on the hope of heaven, granting us boldness to share Your Word—both across the street and around the world—and equipping us to stand strong through every circumstance. Amen.
Praying for Andrew Omerzu, Brad and Molly Turner, Hayden and Emmalynn Sphire, Jake and Bri Rose, Joey and Sarah Koo, Clay and Natalie Winslow, Kyle Soiste, Mike and Charissa Napoles.

Lord, may we effectively magnify the Gospel's influence and be a significant blessing to our colleagues—specifically Arihant, Veda, Chris, Amit, Austin, and Shwetha from the team and the wider IT groups at W&S. Cultivate a psychologically secure space among us for genuine learning. Inspire and assist me in embracing new knowledge. May we devote ourselves wholeheartedly to our work, performing it as for You, truly serving Christ in everything we undertake (Colossians 3:23–24).

Lord, direct the government of the United States. Bestow discernment upon the Executive branch, a spirit of service upon the Legislative branch, and even-handedness to the Judicial branch. Prompt the media and various advocacy groups to operate with integrity. We affirm that You hold the hearts of all leaders in Your hand; redirect them toward Your justice and peace. Amen.

Lord, may Your guiding hand rest upon our family. We bring Jackie before You, praying for her well-being, and we plead for the salvation and protection of Seth, Emily, and their children—Harley and Sophya; Grant John and Alyse wisdom in their daily endeavors, and salvation and protection of Oliver, Remi, and Cassidy. Fortify the relationships of Timothy, Luna, Bill, and Angie. Guide us all to honor You in what we take in, and to convert our frustrations into deeper faith, fully entrusting our whole lives to You. Amen.

Josh McFadden's journey to salvation. Dave Wernz and the ongoing work at GFC. Caleb Combs' neurological well-being. Daniel Allison and Britney, concerning their marriage. Rachael Allen's recovery from cancer; Ben and Rachel Townsend, for the unifying of their family; Rick & Kim Bular, their widowed daughter, and her children.

God, I acknowledge my heart often strays. Bend my will towards Your commands, not personal advantage; turn my gaze from what is vain. Unveil my understanding to grasp the wonders of Your precepts, and unite my fragmented heart to revere Your name alone. Show me Your paths, satisfy me daily with Your unfailing love, so I may delight in You all my life. Amen.

Heavenly Father, we bring before You the leaders of our tri-state region. Pour out Your wisdom upon our Mayors and City Managers, and safeguard our law enforcement officers, upholding their integrity. We ask for unbiased justice in our local courts and discerning stewardship within the governments of Hamilton, Clermont, Boone, Kenton, Campbell, Dearborn, and Ohio counties. May local media speak forth truth. Our confidence is in You, who establishes leaders and unveils deep things; let Your light pervade our local institutions. Amen.

Lord, help me stay faithful in prayer and deepen a love that truly reflects Your truth—first for You, then for my wife and all those in my life. Instill in me a heart eager to share the Gospel with genuine grace. Keep me from chasing fleeting satisfactions and help me deeply value Your sovereign hand in every single detail of my life. Amen

Heavenly Father, I bring my neighbors before You: the opera interns, Ryan and his wife, James, Vanoy’s family, Michael and Austina, Brandon, the Schneiders’ tenants, Kevin, Michelle, those at Steve and Leslie’s, Kara, Ashley, and Alisha. Guide me in cultivating genuine connections with them. Impart Your wisdom to the HOA board, so they may foster a spirit of unity throughout our community. Amen

God, show me how to put Your kingdom and righteousness first. Instill in me the discipline to develop biblical, professional, and life skills, with a heart driven purely by Your glory. Grant me the capacity to learn and the discernment to keep my studies balanced. As Matthew 6:33 promises, I trust You to supply all I need when my growth aligns with Your will. Amen.

Heavenly Father, we bring before You Governors Beshear, DeWine, and Braun. Pour out wisdom upon them and their cabinets, along with a spirit dedicated to service. Let discernment, courage, and unbiased justice be the hallmarks of our state legislators and courts. Guard our state militias and law enforcement agencies; uphold their accountability and strengthen their resolve. We confess Your supreme rule over every season and every authority, petitioning that Your divine wisdom would direct the operations of our tri-state governments. Amen.

Lord, safeguard and empower Your church in constrained regions. May Your message travel beyond every boundary, and uphold those incarcerated for their convictions. Soften the hearts of opposing authorities, and fortify pastors ministering in perilous circumstances. Rouse the church in unencumbered nations to rally behind their suffering spiritual family. Lastly, we intercede specifically for the Pashtun communities: make their spirits receptive and send workers to proclaim Your Gospel. Amen.
